audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in whoami.c are guarded by assert() at function entry or explicit null checks. The only network-attacker-controlled pointer (res from ldap_result) is checked at line 91 via '!res' before any use, and ber_memfree(retoid) is safe because ber_memfree explicitly handles NULL (memory.c:128). No network-attacker-controlled data flows into an unguarded null dereference path.
